name: mole
title: Mole
description: Deep clean and optimize your Mac
author: jlrochin

preferences.name: molePath
preferences.title: Mole Binary Path
preferences.description: Custom path to the mo binary. Leave empty for auto-detection

commands.name: system-status
commands.title: System Status
commands.subtitle: Mole
commands.description: View real-time system health, CPU, memory, disk, battery, and network status

preferences.name: statusRefreshInterval
preferences.title: Refresh Interval
preferences.description: How often to refresh system status data (in seconds)

commands.name: clean
commands.title: Clean System
commands.subtitle: Mole
commands.description: Preview and remove caches, logs, and temporary files to free up disk space

commands.name: optimize
commands.title: Optimize System
commands.subtitle: Mole
commands.description: Rebuild databases, refresh services, and optimize system performance

commands.name: uninstall
commands.title: Uninstall App
commands.subtitle: Mole
commands.description: Uninstall apps and clean residual files from Library, Caches, and Preferences

commands.name: purge
commands.title: Purge Dev Artifacts
commands.subtitle: Mole
commands.description: Find and remove old build artifacts like node_modules, .next, dist, and target folders

commands.name: analyze
commands.title: Analyze Disk
commands.subtitle: Mole
commands.description: Browse folders sorted by size to find what's using your disk space

commands.name: installer
commands.title: Clean Installers
commands.subtitle: Mole
commands.description: Find and remove installer files (.dmg, .pkg, .iso) from Downloads, Desktop, and Documents

commands.name: touchid
commands.title: Touch ID for Sudo
commands.subtitle: Mole
commands.description: Configure Touch ID for sudo authentication

commands.name: update-mole
commands.title: Update Mole
commands.subtitle: Mole
commands.description: Update Mole to the latest version

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
